title: Oil gains amid increasing travel by US consumers
section_path: Oil gains amid increasing travel by US consumers
section_path_text: Oil gains amid increasing travel by US consumers
summary:
Main
Signs of strong demand helped boost sentiment in the energy sector. However, rising inventories weighed on metal markets. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-07-11 091721.png | assets/2024-07-11_oil-gains-amid-increasing-travel-by-us-consumers_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_c38667a2cb40.png

Market Commentary
Brent crude rose amid signs of strong demand.

children.title: Main
children.summary: Signs of strong demand helped boost sentiment in the energy sector. However, rising inventories weighed on metal markets.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Brent crude rose amid signs of strong demand. Jet fuel demand, on a four-week moving average badid, rose to its highest level for this time of year since 2019, according to Energy Information Administration (EIA) data.
